title: Remove Single project template from the list

posts.author: EcoSoch_IT (EcoSoch)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I try to create a project using a template, I see Single project template in the list. Could this Single project template be removed from the list?

The template appears because it is a recommended template for all users but it is causing confusion.
